footer_company_overview: NutraSakr is a modern healthcare, nutraceutical, wellness, and pharmaceutical solutions company serving Egypt, MENA, Africa, and international markets.
contact_address: Nutra Sakr, Industrial Area A4', 10th of Ramadan, Egypt
about_subtitle: Pioneering wellness and pharmaceutical solutions for a healthier tomorrow.
about_vision_p1: NutraSakr is a premier healthcare and nutraceutical manufacturing corporation based in Egypt, proudly serving the MENA region, Africa, and global markets. We believe in the synergy between cutting-edge scientific innovation and natural wellness.
about_vision_p2: Our mission is to empower individuals to live healthier lives by providing world-class, rigorously tested, and accessible nutritional supplements and pharmaceutical products.
research_card1_desc: Our dedicated R&D team continuously explores new bioactive compounds, optimizing bioavailability and stability to create next-generation supplements.
research_card2_desc: Every formulation is rooted in published scientific literature and clinical trials, ensuring that our products deliver measurable health benefits.
research_card3_desc: We maintain strict compliance with local and international regulatory bodies (FDA, EFSA) to guarantee absolute safety.
research_card4_desc: From raw material sourcing to final product testing, our in-house laboratories perform comprehensive microbiological and chemical analyses.
cert_subtitle: Uncompromising standards in every batch we produce.
cert_gmp_desc: Certified compliance with strict international manufacturing and safety protocols.
cert_iso9001_desc: Ensuring consistent quality and continuous improvement across all operations.
cert_iso22000_desc: Highest level of food safety systems for nutritional and dietary supplements.
pl_subtitle: Bring your brand to life with our end-to-end manufacturing expertise.
pl_desc: NutraSakr offers premium B2B contract manufacturing. From custom formula design to final retail packaging, we handle the entire process.
pl_li1: 💊 Formula Design: Custom blends tailored to your market.
pl_li2: 🏭 Production: High-capacity tableting, encapsulation, and powders.
pl_li3: 🏷️ Packaging & Design: Blisters, bottles, sachets, and label design.
pl_li4: 📜 Regulatory Support: Dossier preparation and export registration.
export_subtitle: Delivering premium Egyptian healthcare solutions to the world.
export_desc: NutraSakr is rapidly expanding its global footprint. We currently distribute our high-quality nutraceuticals and medical supplements across the GCC, North Africa, and select international markets.
export_card1_desc: Strong logistics network across regional markets.
export_card2_desc: Compliant with Saudi FDA and regional health ministries.
export_card3_desc: Expanding our footprint into Europe and Asia.
dist_subtitle: Partner with NutraSakr for exclusive market opportunities.
news_subtitle: Latest updates from NutraSakr and the healthcare industry.
news_desc: Check back soon for upcoming press releases, product launches, and scientific articles.
careers_subtitle: Join the team shaping the future of healthcare.
careers_desc: We are always looking for talented professionals in R&D, Quality Control, Sales, and Production. Please send your CV to hr@nutrasakr.com.
req_subtitle: Our team is ready to provide detailed dossiers and catalogs.
privacy_p1: NutraSakr respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy outlines how we collect, process, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.
privacy_p2: We only collect data that you voluntarily provide via our contact forms (Name, Email, Phone, Company) for the purpose of responding to your inquiries.
privacy_p3: Your information is never sold to third parties. It is used strictly for internal business communication, order processing, and customer support.
terms_p1: Welcome to the NutraSakr corporate website. By accessing and using this site, you agree to comply with our terms of service.
terms_p2: All content, logos, text, imagery, and product designs on this website are the intellectual property of NutraSakr and may not be copied, reproduced, or distributed without written consent.
terms_p3: The information provided on this website is for corporate and informational purposes only and is not intended as medical advice. Consumers should always consult a healthcare professional before starting any supplement regimen.
